## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Amy! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: K
Concierge: Great! The orientation takes about 45 minutes.
Partner: Okay
Concierge: Once you complete it, you'll be able to book shifts in the app.
Partner: Okay
